storyboard.content: I suddenly can't catch my breath even when I'm just sitting still
There's a sharp pain in my chest every time I try to breathe in
My right leg is swollen and sore
My heart is racing and I feel really anxious
The breathing trouble came on suddenly about 2 hours ago, and the leg swelling started during my long flight back from Europe earlier today
It's so bad I can barely finish a sentence without stopping to gasp for air
I'm a 47-year-old woman and I just got off a very long international flight from Europe
